untranslatable_reason: This is a capital preservation/withdrawal planning rule, not a position sizing rule for individual trades. It calculates periods until account depletion under withdrawal pressure, which is portfolio management accounting rather than trade-level position sizing (R-multiple, Kelly, volatility scaling, etc.). The formula N = ln(INACTIVE) / ln(1-P%) determines account longevity, not how many contracts/shares to buy on the next trade.
